staticDesignConsideration: Highly adaptable for 240V hardwired environments to ensure peak electrical performance for the heater and high-flow pumps simultaneously.

staticHeroTitle: The V84: The Ultimate 6-Person Vector Powerhouse
staticHydrotherapy: Equipped with a dual-pump V-O-L-T™ system, the V84 drives massive water volume through 36 interchangeable Jetpods. The dual-pump configuration ensures that all six seats receive high-cycle laminar flow for deep-tissue relief without performance drops.
staticClimate: The V84's extensive 84-inch architectural frame is reinforced with the DuraShell® structure and surrounded by high-density Icynene® insulation, providing a superior energy envelope for year-round 104°F performance in cold climates.
staticDesign: An expansive open-concept 6-person design that features two deep-soak therapy buckets and a multi-depth interior for diverse family heights. The geometric aesthetics provide a bold, modern focal point for any high-end landscape architecture.
staticEfficiency: Full integration of the ConstantClean+™ water management system ensures pristine water up to 51 times per day. The V3 Throttle Control system provides manual mastery over pump distribution for maximum power efficiency.
staticDesignConsideration: As a high-capacity 2-pump model, the V84 requires a dedicated 50A/60A electrical circuit to support parallel pump and heater operation safely.
marketingSummary: Vector21 V84 is a six-person spa that combines a spacious layout with powerful, targeted hydrotherapy. It includes two deep therapy seats, two side seats, a mid-level seat, and a super-deep soak seat for full-body immersion. The V-O-L-T™ system drives 36 Jetpods, and with the V3 Throttle Control, you can direct the flow to exactly where you need it most. Whether for personal recovery or social gatherings, the V84 offers a dynamic and customizable spa experience.
therapySummary: It includes two deep therapy seats, two side seats, a mid-level seat, and a super-deep soak seat for full-body immersion.

marketingSummary: Vector21 V84L is a five-person spa that prioritizes refined hydrotherapy and versatile seating. It features a full-body lounge with neck, back, and calf jets, alongside two deep therapy seats and two bucket seats. The V-O-L-T™ system with V3 Throttle Control valves provides precise water pressure management, ensuring a personalized and effective massage for every person. With its elegant design and advanced therapy features, the V84L delivers a superior spa experience.
therapySummary: It features a full-body lounge with neck, back, and calf jets, alongside two deep therapy seats and two bucket seats.
staticHeroTitle: The V84L: Precision Engineered Performance
staticHydrotherapy: Driven by the V-O-L-T™ system, the V84L provides a laminar flow experience that eliminates turbulence and focuses power through interchangeable Jetpods.
staticClimate: The architectural cabinet and high-density insulation package are designed for maximum efficiency and modern backyard aesthetics.
staticDesign: Vector21 models feature a bold, geometric design that maximizes the interior footprint while providing surgical control over massage intensity.
staticEfficiency: V3 Throttle Control valves allow you to direct 100% of pump power to individual seats or H.O.T. Zone® clusters.
staticDesignConsideration: The modular Jetpod system allows for future therapy customization, ensuring the spa evolves with your wellness needs.
staticReasons: V3 Throttle Control for precise power

marketingSummary: Vector21 V94 is a spacious seven-person spa designed for groups and families. Its open layout includes a variety of seating heights and a powerful Regal Whitewater-4™ jet for intense leg and foot therapy. The V-O-L-T™ system with V3 Throttle Control valves allows for dynamic flow management throughout the spa, ensuring everyone receives a high-quality massage. With plenty of room and advanced hydrotherapy features, the V94 is the ultimate choice for social soaking and large-scale relaxation.

marketingSummary: Vector21 V94L is a premium six-person spa that offers a sophisticated and versatile hydrotherapy experience. It features a full-body lounge with neck, back, and leg therapy, alongside two deep therapy seats and three bucket seats. The V-O-L-T™ system and V3 Throttle Control valves provide precise water pressure control, while the powerful Whitewater-4 jet delivers deep-tissue leg and foot massage. With its elegant design and complete range of therapy options, the V94L is a standout choice for those seeking the best in Vector21 innovation.

hotspots.label: Variable Flow Swim System
hotspots.description: Dual-pump high-volume system delivering a professional-grade resistance current for elite aquatic training and rehabilitation.

hotspots.label: Regal Hydrokinetic™ Therapy
hotspots.description: Specialized high-flow massage seats featuring Whitewater-4™ jets for deep-tissue penetration and rapid muscle recovery.

hotspots.label: Marine-Grade DuraShell®
hotspots.description: Industrial-strength structural envelope engineered for extreme aquatic loads and long-term environmental durability.

marketingSummary: The V150P (Party Vessel) is a high-volume aquatic trainer and social sanctuary. Engineered with a 950-gallon capacity and a dual-pump 320 GPM mechanical suite, it delivers professional swim resistance alongside elite therapeutic seating for up to eight adults.
therapySummary: A hybrid fitness/social environment featuring 36 Velocity-Treated jets and high-output Whitewater-4™ therapy zones.
staticHeroTitle: The V150P: The Professional Social Aquatic Trainer
staticHydrotherapy: The V150P combines high-velocity swim training with high-flow hydrotherapy. Its dual-pump system drives 36 specialized jets, including the signature Whitewater-4™ geyser, providing 10+ seating positions for full-body recovery.
staticClimate: Equipped with marine-grade DuraShell® and reinforced structural framing, the V150P is built for year-round 104°F performance. Its high thermal retention allows for efficient outdoor training in any weather.
staticDesign: A 150-inch architectural vessel designed for social density and athletic performance. Features a dedicated swim lane alongside symmetrical therapy seating, maximizing both social and fitness utility.
staticEfficiency: Advanced high-volume filtration manages the 950-gallon environment with industrial efficiency. The Variable Flow controls allow for independent adjustment of the swim current and therapy zones, optimizing power draw.
staticDesignConsideration: Requires a dedicated 50A/60A electrical placement and a reinforced reinforced concrete pad capable of supporting its ~10,000 lb operating mass.

hotspots.label: Variable Flow Swim System
hotspots.description: Dual-pump high-volume system delivering a professional-grade resistance current for elite aquatic training and rehabilitation.

hotspots.label: Regal Hydrokinetic™ Therapy
hotspots.description: Specialized high-flow massage seats featuring Whitewater-4™ jets for deep-tissue penetration and rapid muscle recovery.

hotspots.label: Marine-Grade DuraShell®
hotspots.description: Industrial-strength structural envelope engineered for extreme aquatic loads and long-term environmental durability.

marketingSummary: The V150W is a versatile aquatic training vessel engineered for uncompromising fitness and recovery. With a 1000-gallon capacity and a reinforced swim lane, it provides a stable environment for swimming, rowing, and low-impact aquatic conditioning.
therapySummary: Optimized for athletic recovery with 34 Velocity-Treated jets and strategic H.O.T. Zone® therapy clusters.
staticHeroTitle: The V150W: The Elite Aquatic Conditioning Lab
staticHydrotherapy: Powered by a high-output dual-pump system, the V150W delivers a precision-controlled swim current. Its 34 technical jets are strategically positioned for major muscle group recovery, ensuring athletes maintain peak conditioning.
staticClimate: Wrapped in marine-grade DuraShell® and industrial thermal insulation, the V150W maintains consistent aquatic temperatures in high-duty cycle fitness environments, ensuring year-round outdoor utility.
staticDesign: The V150W features an open-concept swim area for maximum range of motion during fitness activities. Balanced by high-flow therapy seats, it offers a professional recovery solution for the home athlete.
staticEfficiency: Water hygiene is maintained by high-cycle filtration designed for large-volume swim spas. Variable speed controls allow for precise energy management between training and therapy modes.
staticDesignConsideration: Requires professional 50A electrical installation and a structurally engineered foundation capable of supporting its ~11,000 lb total operating mass.

hotspots.label: Variable Flow Swim System
hotspots.description: High-velocity 320 GPM swim current system engineered for endurance training and aquatic conditioning.

hotspots.label: Deep-Tissue Therapy Seats
hotspots.description: Ergonomically sculpted recovery zones featuring high-flow jets for targeted major muscle group therapy.

hotspots.label: DuraShell® Integrity
hotspots.description: Marine-grade structural shell designed to handle the 13,300 lb operating mass of the 174-inch vessel.

marketingSummary: The V174S (Sport/Splash) is a 174-inch aquatic training vessel designed for serious athletes. With a 1,300-gallon volume and a dual-pump 320 GPM system, it provides a professional-grade swim lane alongside dedicated high-flow therapy seating.
therapySummary: Dual deep-tissue therapy seats optimized for post-workout recovery using Velocity-Treated jets.
staticHeroTitle: The V174S: The Professional 174" Training Vessel
staticHydrotherapy: The V174S features a specialized dual-pump system engineered for high-velocity swim resistance. Complemented by two deep-therapy seats, it provides a comprehensive 26-jet aquatic conditioning and recovery suite.
staticClimate: Built with marine-grade DuraShell® and a reinforced structural framing system, the V174S maintains thermal integrity in high-load outdoor environments, supporting 104°F operational standards year-round.
staticDesign: A massive 174-inch footprint providing a dedicated, unobstructed swim lane. The 'Splash' design emphasizes open water for aquatic aerobics and high-resistance swimming, balanced by ergonomic recovery zones.
staticEfficiency: Industrial-scale filtration manages the 1,300-gallon thermal mass with high-cycle efficiency. Variable controls allow for precise tuning of the swim current to match the athlete's performance tier.
staticDesignConsideration: Requires a level, reinforced 6-inch concrete pad capable of supporting over 15,000 lbs and a dedicated 60A electrical placement.

hotspots.label: Variable Flow Swim System
hotspots.description: The strongest swim current in the ATV lineup, delivering unmatched resistance for professional-grade aquatic conditioning.

hotspots.label: H.O.T. Zone® Therapy
hotspots.description: High-Output Therapy zones concentrated in two deep recovery seats for targeted orthopedic muscle relief.

hotspots.label: DuraShell® Integrity
hotspots.description: Proprietary marine-grade structural envelope engineered for the 14,200 lb operating mass of the Kona flagship.

marketingSummary: The V174K (Kona) is the flagship aquatic training vessel in the ATV series. Engineered for maximum resistance and capacity (1,400 gallons), it features our most powerful swim current system alongside dual orthopedic therapy seats for elite athletic recovery.
therapySummary: Top-tier aquatic trainer featuring 26 Velocity-Treated jets and high-output H.O.T. Zone® therapy clusters.
staticHeroTitle: The V174K: The Flagship 1400-Gallon Aquatic Lab
staticHydrotherapy: The Kona is engineered with our highest-output pump system to drive 26 specialized jets. Its dual therapy seats are designed for elite orthopedic recovery, focusing on the lumbar, neck, and shoulder regions after high-intensity training.
staticClimate: The V174K's reinforced DuraShell® and full-depth thermal insulation package are designed for uncompromising outdoor performance, maintaining 104°F setpoints even in extreme sub-zero conditions.
staticDesign: A 174-inch performance architecture that provides the deepest and widest swim current in the series. The Kona design prioritizes hydro-mechanical efficiency and structural integrity for the most demanding fitness enthusiasts.
staticEfficiency: Features our most advanced high-capacity filtration system, capable of processing the 1,400-gallon volume with professional-grade turnover rates. Variable frequency drives allow for precise current calibration.
staticDesignConsideration: Requires an engineered reinforced foundation capable of supporting the ~16,000 lb total mass and a dedicated high-amperage 60A electrical placement.
